title: Instruction Execution and Sequencing Flow
description: A flowchart depicting the sequential stages a CPU follows to fetch, decode, and execute an instruction, and then determine the next instruction address.
relationships: IF uses PC to get instruction from Instruction Memory
ID decodes instruction and reads Register File
OF fetches operands from memory (if needed)
WB writes result back to Register File
PC is updated to point to the next sequential instruction or a branch target
